item.title: Memes vol 346
item.description:
My boyfriend’s cat is named Bella but she’s really fat (we got her like that) so we call her Belly
And their smiles!!
We really did!
She’s living my dream
My dad named Timothy goes my Moth. No he doesn’t why’d I say that
I’m so bad with this. My boyfriend loves surprises so I bought us tickets for SuicideBoys and was immediately like “guess what we’re doing!”
Nessie tax
Liza Jane tax
Scruffy tax
Froggy tax

item.dc:creator: Jbelkin

item.title: Everyone deserves a second chance
item.description:
Hey everyone, that's me! And my 18 year old blind and deaf dog Nanna!!!
If you've seen my posts you know my little family and I moved to Minneapolis 6 months ago Nanna has been a star ever since we got here -
I've been taking her to bridges all over Minnesota so she can feel the breeze on her face People seem to love her adventures, it makes me feel really good that so many people follow along And yes - I talk to my deaf dog lol - -
The summer is tough on an 18 year old dog, we went about 3 months without being able to have a long adventure together But now that it's cooling off again - It's Nanna Season
So we fired back up the bridge trips and the Fox affiliate did this story on her
It's been fun having Nanna get recognized after all these news stories, she has a pretty unique face All my old neighbors love her and are constantly giving us little treat bags and toys for her, it's super cute
Moving here turned out to be the best decision I've ever made, we both love it so much
I also like to use these posts as a way to communicate TheFreePizzaDude stuff Every once in a while it kinda feels like it's fading away and interest dims, so anything I can do to remind people we're there and always looking for help I'm excited to do
We'll be posting as @TheFreePizzaDude tomorrow, Saturday at noon central! Stop by for upvotes or if you're able to send someone a meal we'll all be there for 6 hours happy to have you
We have good days together and we have incredibly challenging days too, but adopting her showed me that if I can love someone despite their past then people can love me despite mine. Everyone deserves a second chance - I did, Nanna did, and you do too. Make the most of it, just like Nanna Pants. ... If you can't make TheFreePizzaDude post but still want to help someone get a meal, you can always contribute and Pizza Angels will send the food for you! Anonymous Angels are such a big part of our success I love you all so much. https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude ... A lot of new fosters and good changes in Minnesota lately, I'll be back with more wholesome stories soon!
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett

item.title: Bottom shelf memes worth riding off into the sunset with.

@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Come heckle us. Follow the channel to be notified when we go live.
Deaf cat Magoo (short for Oogala Magoogala) sleeping peacefully now that we've finally deleted discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka

item.dc:creator: osteenbradley2

item.title: The 12sh Dungeons and Degeneracy Album. Because I'm bored today and wanna be doing dragon stuff!
item.description:
First off. Most DnD memes are great exaggerations of events of big flexes on the rules. Second off most of what's left are made by people who don't know the rules at all. So don't @ me over them. I am *aware*. I just got a laugh.
Qvuack
This is in my head, rent free. If you ask for help, listen to the response. If someone details help for you because you asked for it, and you don't at least make an effort to incorporate it, what are you even doing? Sure not all help is good, but we're putting aside obviously bad solutions, don't come here saying "what if it's terrible help and would make things worse", well then that wouldn't be help, now would it? It's disrespectful to ask for help and then ignore it. And DMs? Never be afraid to ask for help when you need it. Archive coming in a bit.
item.dc:creator: Icouri

item.title: the harpy's meme library: volume 62 (money skull)
item.description:
Hello and welcome to another meme dump, my imgur friends. It is friday. Let us view another collection of amusing images I have (respectfully) thieved.
Don't forget the bats, bats eat a shitton of insects. SAVE THE BATS TOO
The moon from Majora's Mask still creeps me out
chomp
I don't care how evil my character is, I'm still petting the dog
...well, shit.
spooky time, bitches
Probably not, but I'm gonna continue to post nonsense anyway, you can't stop me
if not friend, why friend shaped?
can I have both, I'm poor but also skulls are neato
Feeling pretty 9 today
Hell yeah. That's all for this meme dump, my imgur friends. Until the next one, don't forget to be awesome.
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy
